fields.description: Frozen ALA snapshot identifier.
fields.name: source_snapshot_id

fields.description: Semantic fingerprint of the source snapshot.
fields.name: source_snapshot_fingerprint

fields.description: Physical SHA-256 of the normalized occurrence artifact.
fields.name: source_occurrence_artifact_sha256

fields.description: Closed national, provider-context, or H3 scope type.
fields.name: scope_type

fields.description: Stable national-to-local sort order.
fields.name: scope_order

fields.description: Stable scope identifier.
fields.name: scope_id

fields.description: Provider label or H3 cell identifier.
fields.name: scope_label

fields.description: National, coarse, regional, or local presentation class.
fields.name: scope_resolution_class

fields.description: Whether publicly generalised rows may contribute to this scope.
fields.name: sensitive_membership_policy

fields.description: Source of the scope membership assertion.
fields.name: contextual_source

fields.description: H3 resolution for H3 scopes only.
fields.name: h3_resolution

fields.description: H3 cell identifier for H3 scopes only.
fields.name: h3_cell_id

fields.description: Configured parent H3 cell for regional/local scopes.
fields.name: parent_h3_cell_id

fields.description: Derived H3 center latitude; not an occurrence coordinate.
fields.name: cell_center_latitude

fields.description: Derived H3 center longitude; not an occurrence coordinate.
fields.name: cell_center_longitude

fields.description: Number of eligible ALA baseline occurrence-evidence rows in the scope.
fields.name: record_count

fields.description: Rows with an exact ALA taxonConceptID crosswalk match.
fields.name: matched_taxon_record_count

fields.description: Rows retaining an unmatched provider taxon assertion.
fields.name: unmatched_taxon_assertion_count

fields.description: Distinct exactly crosswalked ButterflyLens taxon keys.
fields.name: unique_butterflylens_taxon_count

fields.description: Distinct contributing ALA data-resource identifiers.
fields.name: unique_data_resource_count

fields.description: Provider basis category count; not human verification.
fields.name: human_observation_count

fields.description: Machine-observation basis category count.
fields.name: machine_observation_count

fields.description: Unspecified observation basis category count.
fields.name: unspecified_observation_count

fields.description: Material-sample basis category count.
fields.name: material_sample_count

fields.description: Preserved-specimen basis category count.
fields.name: preserved_specimen_count

fields.description: Fossil-specimen basis category count.
fields.name: fossil_specimen_count

fields.description: Unspecified occurrence basis category count.
fields.name: unspecified_occurrence_count

fields.description: Other or missing basis category count.
fields.name: other_or_not_supplied_count

fields.description: Earliest parseable event year in the scope.
fields.name: earliest_event_year

fields.description: Latest parseable event year in the scope.
fields.name: latest_event_year

fields.description: Rows with supplied numeric coordinate uncertainty.
fields.name: coordinate_uncertainty_known_count

fields.description: Rows without supplied numeric coordinate uncertainty.
fields.name: coordinate_uncertainty_missing_count

fields.description: Maximum supplied coordinate uncertainty in the scope.
fields.name: maximum_coordinate_uncertainty_meters

fields.description: Rows marked generalised or alreadyGeneralised by ALA.
fields.name: publicly_generalised_record_count

fields.description: SHA-256 over ordered normalized source-row fingerprints.
fields.name: source_record_fingerprint_digest

fields.description: SHA-256 of the aggregate semantic row before this field is added.
fields.name: aggregate_fingerprint

invariants: scope_id is unique and rows are sorted by scope_order then scope_id
every record_count decomposes into matched and unmatched taxon rows
every record_count decomposes into the closed evidence-category counts
publicly generalised rows contribute only to Australia, state/territory, and H3 resolution 3
IBRA and LGA values remain ALA contextual assertions and no boundary geometry is copied
H3 centers are derived cell centers and are not occurrence coordinates
source_record_fingerprint_digest binds each aggregate to ordered normalized source rows
